title: Catching the Flow: Real Streamflow Data
description: Pull live USGS records for four curated CONUS gauges spanning flood-prone Maine to arid Arizona — or enter any gauge ID. Plot the annual regime, spot a flood event, and read a flow-duration curve. Falls back to seeded synthetic data when the network is unavailable.

citation.text: USGS National Water Information System (NWIS). https://waterdata.usgs.gov/

author: Mohammad Galib, Purdue University
